description: Scores the document ingestion pipeline (parse -> schema inference -> sheet selection -> normalization -> hierarchical chunking -> retrieval) against synthetic golden fixtures. DP-01..06 and DP-08 are deterministic rule-based checks against structured pipeline output; DP-07 uses a provider-agnostic LLM judge (Claude default, Gemini when LLM_PROVIDER=gemini) and is skipped offline.

dimensions.name: Schema Role Accuracy
dimensions.scoring_method: inferred semantic_role matches golden / expected roles * 10, averaged over tabular fixtures
dimensions.applies_to: csv / xlsx fixtures with expected schema_roles

dimensions.name: Sheet Selection Correctness
dimensions.scoring_method: selected sheet name (4) + transaction_ledger role (3) + header_row match (3)

dimensions.name: Normalization Fidelity
dimensions.scoring_method: line_count match (4) + total_amount within 1% (4) + currency captured (2)

dimensions.name: Chunk Structure Integrity
dimensions.scoring_method: parents>=min, children>=min, no empty children, no orphan children, child size <= 1.5x DOC_CHILD_CHARS, heading_path populated (when expected), table rows split (when expected)

dimensions.name: Retrieval Precision
dimensions.scoring_method: (0.6 * hit_rate + 0.4 * MRR) * 10 over (query -> expected substring) pairs

dimensions.name: Parse Fidelity (LLM judge)
dimensions.scoring_method: LLM judge rates extraction coherence/completeness 0-10; skipped (not counted) when no provider

dimensions.name: Quality-Flag Capture
dimensions.scoring_method: ingestion quality flags present (4) + zero_spend_warning matches expectation (4) + warnings raised on malformed input (2)
